title: Kurivikod Heat Wave
lead: Kurivikod is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.43. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, earning a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kurivikod has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.0 GG, indicating a significant increase in energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 79%, and the wind speed is 20.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat stress. 
 The Heat Wave Level is classified as CRITICAL, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, highlighting the extreme heat conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
